enum  {
  SALU = 1 << 3 , VALU = 1 << 4 , SOP1 = 1 << 5 , SOP2 = 1 << 6 ,
  SOPC = 1 << 7 , SOPK = 1 << 8 , SOPP = 1 << 9 , VOP1 = 1 << 10 ,
  VOP2 = 1 << 11 , VOP3 = 1 << 12 , VOPC = 1 << 13 , MUBUF = 1 << 14 ,
  MTBUF = 1 << 15 , SMRD = 1 << 16 , DS = 1 << 17 , MIMG = 1 << 18 ,
  FLAT = 1 << 19 , WQM = 1 << 20 , VGPRSpill = 1 << 21
}
enum  Flags { VM_CNT = 1 << 0 , EXP_CNT = 1 << 1 , LGKM_CNT = 1 << 2 }
enum  ClassFlags {
  S_NAN = 1 << 0 , Q_NAN = 1 << 1 , N_INFINITY = 1 << 2 , N_NORMAL = 1 << 3 ,
  N_SUBNORMAL = 1 << 4 , N_ZERO = 1 << 5 , P_ZERO = 1 << 6 , P_SUBNORMAL = 1 << 7 ,
  P_NORMAL = 1 << 8 , P_INFINITY = 1 << 9
}
